title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 5–9, this part focuses on Kid, Unknown person #5, Big Mom, Unknown person #6, Chopper, Unknown person #7 as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Poker!! Strawhat and the others are headed your way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Gorishiro! Don't drop your banana crumbs on me!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Kid managed to slip past us, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at this!! Strawhat has a bounty of 1.5 billion!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we take him out, we won't just be saving face!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, we'll be promoted to "flying six" for sure!! Not bad, eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, since the stairway is filled with enemies...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We recommend you to climb up to the fourth floor from HERE.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank goodness. I thought that old HAG was going to...

dialogue.speaker: Apoo
dialogue.text: Run, Apoo! run like the wind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're not gonna die here, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've figured out the composition of this virus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Use fire to counter the ice demons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This virus contains a gas that freezes the body!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at me!! If you stop the body from freezing, you can contain the spread of the virus!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will make enough antibodies for every- one!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
